text.more: This interactive network visualization shows relationships among characters in Les Miserables. The graph was imported into Gephi as an undirected network, arranged using the ForceAtlas 2 layout, colored by modularity class to highlight communities, and sized by degree to emphasize the most connected characters. The visualization allows exploration of clusters, central characters, and connections across the narrative.
text.intro: Interactive visualization of the Les Miserables character co-occurrence network created in Gephi using ForceAtlas 2, modularity-based communities, and degree-based node sizing.
text.title: Les Miserables Character Network
